title: Accounting and Finance Basics
shortSummary: Read financial statements, understand costs, and speak the language of money. A marketer who cannot explain how their spend hits the P&L will never earn budget trust.
whyItMatters: Reading P&L statements, understanding marketing budget mechanics, financial ratios, and communicating marketing value in financial terms is what separates marketers who get budget from those who beg for it.
coreConcepts: Cash flow statement and why cash flow kills companies
Key financial ratios (gross margin, ROI, ROAS, payback period)
Financial modelling for marketing investment cases
